author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Follow-up sweep: documented 7 additional keys not in the original GH#582 list of 19. (1) 5 watchdog keys read by read_watchdog_config in kickoff/launch.rs: watchdog.enabled, .staleness_secs, .max_nudges, .check_interval_secs, .grace_period_secs (defaults from WatchdogConfig::default in kickoff/types.rs). (2) 2 keys read by .claude/hooks/crosslink_config.py and prompt-guard.py: crosslink_binary (explicit path to crosslink binary for hook subshells; defaults to PATH lookup) and context_budget_chars (prompt-guard context window estimate; default 1_000_000). Verified exhaustive coverage by greping every config.get/[] call in src/ and .claude/hooks/ — stale_lock_timeout_minutes is the only remaining lookalike but lives in locks.json, not hook-config.json. Total documented: 37 keys, up from 11 baseline.
